layers.name: Layer 1 - Stabilize
layers.summary: Verify local modules, protect approval-first mode, keep persistence recoverable, and improve logs.

layers.name: Layer 2 - Strengthen
layers.summary: Improve agents, queues, content workflows, KPI logic, and UI review surfaces.

layers.name: Layer 3 - Orchestrate
layers.summary: Coordinate parent/child task routing, dependencies, retries, fallback systems, and health checks.

layers.name: Layer 4 - Scale Internally
layers.summary: Create reusable templates, shared state structures, simulation modes, and dashboard visualization.

layers.name: Layer 5 - Hold For Orders
layers.summary: Stop before real external APIs, deployment, paid services, credential changes, or public launch.

supportAgents.name: Architecture Orchestrator
supportAgents.purpose: Coordinate parent and support agents, route tasks by dependency, and keep expansion layered.

supportAgents.name: Compliance Guardian
supportAgents.purpose: Keep posting, funnel, and promotional workflows inside approval-first and platform-safe limits.

supportAgents.name: Queue Auditor
supportAgents.purpose: Audit scheduled, pending, failed, and posted queue states for retry safety and duplicate-risk prevention.
schedules: Every 5 minutes in local dashboard mode

supportAgents.name: Content Quality Reviewer
supportAgents.purpose: Review generated copy for clarity, CTA discipline, duplication, and policy-safe language before scheduling.

supportAgents.name: Projection Skeptic
supportAgents.purpose: Challenge KPI assumptions so revenue projections remain labeled, conservative, and non-guaranteed.

buildLog.summary: Book Growth OS seeded with local data, agent runs, dashboard panels, and approval-first controls.
Scheduler, queue engine, mock social connectors, and posting logs added without live external posting.

permissionsMap.boundary: Must register purpose, parent, inputs, outputs, schedule, permissions, dependencies.
No real external posting without explicit approval.
Requires explicit approval and server-side credentials.

roadmapQueue.item: Add durable state migration guards for new localStorage fields.
Add content QA scoring before posts move to scheduled.
Add exportable approval packets for manual posting.
Simulate future server-side queue worker without live external calls.

awaitingAuthorization.item: Connect X API v2 for real posting.
Connect Meta Graph API for Facebook and Instagram posting.
awaitingAuthorization.reason: External API, app review, tokens, and platform policy review required.

awaitingAuthorization.item: Run paid ads or connect ad accounts.
